title: Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
